metadata._yoast_wpseo_metadesc: Municipal GIS project management starts with client questions, not data. Learn to deliver solutions engineers and residents can actually use.

metadata._yoast_wpseo_twitter-description: Better municipal GIS project management starts with the right questions — not the latest tools. Here's how.
